name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
Forks == forks \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1]
States == states \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == Forks /\ States

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states' == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> IF states[i] = "thinking" THEN "hungry" ELSE states[i]]
        /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ states' == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> IF states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i) THEN "eating" ELSE states[i]]
        /\ forks' = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> IF states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i) THEN i ELSE forks[i]]
        \/ /\ states' == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> IF states[i] = "eating" THEN "thinking" ELSE states[i]]
        /\ forks' = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> IF states[i] = "eating" THEN i ELSE forks[i]]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = NULL
           /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks[j] \in Nat
          /\ offsets[j] \in Nat
        /\ epsilon' \in Nat

Avg == (1 \div N) * Sum(i \in 1..N, clocks[i])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

TypeOK == /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ \E p \in free:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
            /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
            /\ free' = free \cup {p}
        \/ /\ free' = free
            /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
